prompt: Surreal yet photorealistic single scene of a vast open field with three distinct wooden platforms of different heights arranged side by side. On the left platform (highest), a dense group of tall people in uniform blue clothing stands proudly looking forward. On the middle platform (medium height), a group of medium-height people in green clothing also stands confidently. On the right platform (lowest), a group of shorter people in red clothing stands with good posture. However, when viewing the entire composition as one crowd, the overall average height of all people combined appears paradoxically reversed — the combined scene subtly suggests the red group on the low platform contributes disproportionately to making the whole look taller than expected from the subgroups. Natural daylight, soft atmospheric perspective, detailed realistic human figures of diverse ages and genders within each color-coded group, strong figure-ground relationship, uncanny visual tension where local and global perceptions contradict. No text, no labels, no numbers, no arrows, no charts, no mathematical symbols. Photorealistic with subtle surreal distortion only in the height perception, single frame, magazine-cover quality composition.
visual_logic: Three subgroups show consistent local trends in height on separate platforms, but the combined single scene creates a contradictory overall average height reversal, making local truth and global truth simultaneously visible and incompatible.
